message: Good morning! Are you looking for someone?
Yes, I'm here to see the guidance counsellor. Can you help me find their office?
Of course! The guidance counsellor's office is just inside the main building, down the hall on the left.
Thank you so much! I'll head there now.
No problem at all. If you get lost, feel free to ask anyone for directions.
Time to find the guidance counsellor's office.

actions.title: Find the guidance counsellor's office
actions.description: You can click or select doors to move between rooms.
